top3.sql:
SELECT DISTINCT u.DisplayName
FROM users u
JOIN posts p ON u.Id = p.OwnerUserId
WHERE p.PostTypeId = 1;  -- Assuming "well-finished" means questions (PostTypeId = 1)

SELECT DISTINCT u.DisplayName
FROM users u
JOIN posts p ON u.Id = p.OwnerUserId
WHERE p.PostTypeId = 1;  -- Assuming PostTypeId = 1 represents well-finished questions (e.g., accepted answers or completed posts)

SELECT DISTINCT u.DisplayName
FROM users u
JOIN posts p ON u.Id = p.OwnerUserId
WHERE p.PostTypeId = 1;  -- Assuming "well-finished" means questions (PostTypeId = 1)

SELECT DISTINCT u.DisplayName
FROM users u
JOIN posts p ON u.Id = p.OwnerUserId
WHERE p.PostTypeId = 1 AND p.AcceptedAnswerId IS NOT NULL;

SELECT DISTINCT u.DisplayName
FROM users u
JOIN posts p ON u.Id = p.OwnerUserId
WHERE p.PostTypeId = 1 AND p.AcceptedAnswerId IS NOT NULL;  -- Well-finished questions (PostTypeId = 1) with an accepted answer

SELECT DISTINCT u.DisplayName
FROM users u
JOIN posts p ON u.Id = p.OwnerUserId
WHERE p.PostTypeId = 1;  -- Assuming "well-finished" means questions (PostTypeId = 1)

SELECT DISTINCT u.DisplayName
FROM users u
JOIN posts p ON u.Id = p.OwnerUserId
WHERE p.PostTypeId = 1 AND p.AcceptedAnswerId IS NOT NULL;

SELECT DISTINCT u.DisplayName
FROM users u
JOIN posts p ON u.Id = p.OwnerUserId
WHERE p.PostTypeId = 1 AND p.AcceptedAnswerId IS NOT NULL;  -- Well-finished questions (PostTypeId = 1) with an accepted answer

final.sql:
SELECT DISTINCT u.DisplayName
FROM users u
JOIN posts p ON u.Id = p.OwnerUserId
WHERE p.PostTypeId = 1;  -- Assuming "well-finished" means questions (PostTypeId = 1)
